Class GameEngine

java.lang.Object
jogo.engine.GameEngine
public class GameEngine extends Object
Utility class responsible for managing core game logic and validating action requests performed by the players.
Author:
Fabio Cruz, Tiago Silva

  • Method Details

    • createStructure

      public static void createStructure(WorldMap map, Player player, StructuresType structureType, int x, int y, int scoreModifier) throws GameException
      Constructs and places a structure on the map at the specified coordinates. Validates space availability, player Action Points, and required resources before construction.
      Parameters:
      map - The WorldMap where the structure will be placed.
      player - The Player who will own the new structure.
      structureType - The type of structure to be built.
      x - The X-coordinate on the map grid.
      y - The Y-coordinate on the map grid.
      scoreModifier - The current score multiplier affecting the points granted upon construction.
      Throws:
      SpaceAlreadyOccupiedException - If the target coordinates are already occupied by another structure.
      InsufficientAPException - If the player does not have enough Action Points (AP) to build the structure.
      InsufficientResourcesException - If the player lacks the required amount of the specific resource material.
      GameException - If any generic game logic violation occurs during execution.

    • upgradeStructure

      public static void upgradeStructure(WorldMap map, Player player, int x, int y, int scoreModifier) throws GameException
      Upgrades an existing structure on the map at the specified coordinates. Validates interaction rights and checks if the player has enough Action Points (AP) before performing the upgrade.
      Parameters:
      map - The current WorldMap instance.
      player - The Player attempting to upgrade the structure.
      x - The X-coordinate of the target structure.
      y - The Y-coordinate of the target structure.
      scoreModifier - The current score multiplier affecting the points granted upon upgrading.
      Throws:
      InsufficientAPException - If the player lacks the required Action Points (AP) to upgrade.
      GameException - If the structure does not exist, belongs to the opponent, or any other validation fails.

    • searchResources

      public static int searchResources(Player player, ResourceType type) throws GameException
      Prevents player soft-locking by allowing manual resource gathering without requiring structures. Consumes a fixed amount of Action Points (AP) to generate a random quantity of a specific resource.
      Parameters:
      player - The Player performing the search action.
      type - The ResourceType to be gathered.
      Returns:
      The total quantity of resources successfully gathered.
      Throws:
      InsufficientAPException - If the player lacks the required Action Points (AP) to perform the search.
      GameException - If the requested resource type is invalid or cannot be gathered manually.

    • getStructureInfo

      public static Structures getStructureInfo(WorldMap map, int x, int y) throws GameException
      Retrieves the structure information located at the specified map coordinates.
      Parameters:
      map - The current WorldMap instance.
      x - The X-coordinate on the map grid.
      y - The Y-coordinate on the map grid.
      Returns:
      The Structures object found at the given position.
      Throws:
      StructureDontExistException - If no structure exists at the specified coordinates.
      GameException - If any generic game logic violation occurs during execution.

    • calculateEndDayCosts

      public static Map<ResourceType, Integer> calculateEndDayCosts(WorldMap map, Player player)
      Calculates the resources that will be consumed by a specific player's structures at the end of the day.
      Parameters:
      map - The current WorldMap instance.
      player - The player whose structures will be checked.
      Returns:
      A map containing the total cost of WOOD, STONE and FOOD.

      public static int getApCostSearch()

      public static int getBaseSearchValue()
